Poker Hand #RC1000002: Hold'em No Limit ($0.01/$0.02) - 2026/05/21 03:00:30
Table 'TestTable' 6-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: Hero ($2 in chips)
Seat 2: Villain1 ($2 in chips)
Seat 3: Villain2 ($2 in chips)
Villain1: posts small blind $0.01
Villain2: posts big blind $0.02
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to Hero [7c 2d]
Hero: folds
Villain1: folds
Uncalled bet ($0.01) returned to Villain2
*** SHOWDOWN ***
Villain2 collected $0.02 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot $0.02 | Rake $0 | Jackpot $0 | Bingo $0 | Fortune $0 | Tax $0
Seat 1: Hero (button) folded before Flop (didn't bet)
Seat 2: Villain1 (small blind) folded before Flop
Seat 3: Villain2 (big blind) collected ($0.02)
